subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest my clamor and witnesseth my cry, knoweth my yearning and the sighing of my inmost being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت تسمع ضجیجی و تشهد صریخی و تعلم حنینی و تاوه سری و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
